//: Enforces the styling rules from CLAUDE.md §9. Requires: stylelint, stylelint-config-standard-scss.

color-no-hex.message: Use a PrimeNG design token (var(--p-...)) instead of a hex color.

selector-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated. Style via PrimeNG design tokens on :host instead.

declaration-property-unit-disallowed-lis.message: Use spacing tokens (var(--p-spacing-*)) instead of raw px for layout spacing.
